rationale_source: F1.AD canonical-string normalization (ADDRESS_ABBREV_EXPAND): abbreviated forms ('Rd', 'NW') normalize to canonical ('Road', 'NW' preserved) → cross-source agreement after normalization

subject_property_address.rationale: Broker uses 'Rd' abbreviation; docs use 'Road' full form. F1.AD normalization (Rd→Road) yields same canonical value across sources.

discrepancyHold.rationale: After normalization, broker + docs agree. No discrepancy.

must_include.rationale: Normalized canonical F1.AD value (Road not Rd).
